title: Kiss
why_this_song: Kiss by Prince (1986) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You don't have to be beautiful"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You don't have to be cool to rule my world"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You don't have to be cool to rule my world"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I just want your extra time and your kiss"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I just want your extra time and your kiss"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rule" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rule" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You don't have to be beautiful
You got to not talk dirty, baby

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Act your age, Mama! (Not your shoe size)

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Kiss" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Kiss"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Prince one question about "Kiss", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Prince sobre "Kiss", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Kiss" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Kiss" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
